update_lock.description: File created to indicate update in progress, deleted after update is done

hndr_symlink.description: The active configuration of hndr is deployed in hndr-1 or hndr-2 and referenced using symbolic link set to this key

hndr_config.description: Path to the hndr configuration file

sensor_config.description: Path to the sensor configuration file

folder_one.description: One of the 2 paths to store the hndr configuration

folder_two.description: One of the 2 paths to store the hndr configuration

rules_folder.description: Folder to deploy the rules package updates

ids_service_name.description: Name of the IDS service as used in supervisord.conf file

scratch_folder.description: Scratch folder to save the received package

api_server_url.description: Base URL of the API server

certificate_verify_skip.description: Whether to skip TLS certificate verification

poll_interval_mins.description: Poll server for updates at specified interval

daemonize.description: Whether to run as a background daemon
